app.name: MeshInfo
app.one_liner: Realtime web UI to run against a Meshtastic regional or private mesh network.

screens.name: Chat View
screens.purpose: Show message history and enable inspection of Meshtastic chat traffic.

screens.name: Main Dashboard
screens.purpose: Display real-time node telemetry, messages, and map visualization for the Meshtastic mesh network.

screens.name: Node Details
screens.purpose: Present detailed information about a specific mesh node including metadata and telemetry.

rust_commands.name: fetch_node_info
rust_commands.purpose: Retrieve detailed node information including telemetry and metadata.

rust_commands.name: load_chat_history
rust_commands.purpose: Fetch and render historical chat messages from PostgreSQL storage.

rust_commands.name: migrate_storage
rust_commands.purpose: Migrate existing JSON/filesystem data to PostgreSQL as required by v2.0.1+.

mvp_plan: week 1: Build chat history viewer with pagination
week 1: Implement main dashboard with node list and map
week 1: Set up PostgreSQL-backed data ingestion from MQTT
acceptance_tests: All node detail links are functional and resolve correctly
Chat view loads within 2 seconds for networks with <1000 messages
Data migration from legacy JSON storage completes without loss
System rejects startup if PostgreSQL is not configured (enforce v2.0.1+ requirement)
